name: Speaker for the Ice Barriers
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>依</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>より</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Speaker Priestess of the Ice Barrier
desc: While you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, Defense Position monsters your opponent controls cannot change their battle positions. You can only use each of the following effects of "Speaker for the Ice Barriers" once per turn. If you control an "Ice Barrier" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If you control an "Ice Barrier" monster: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Ice Barrier Token" (Aqua/WATER/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0).
mnst_eff: While you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, Defense Position monsters your opponent controls cannot change their battle positions. You can only use each of the following effects of "Speaker for the Ice Barriers" once per turn. If you control an "Ice Barrier" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If you control an "Ice Barrier" monster: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Ice Barrier Token" (Aqua/WATER/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0).
eff: While you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, Defense Position monsters your opponent controls cannot change their battle positions. You can only use each of the following effects of "Speaker for the Ice Barriers" once per turn. If you control an "Ice Barrier" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If you control an "Ice Barrier" monster: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Ice Barrier Token" (Aqua/WATER/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0).

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
